节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Set the network extended attribute for a {@link NetHandle} object. To invoke this method, you must have the {@code ohos.permission.SET_NET_EXT_ATTRIBUTE} permission.
注释信息: @param { NetHandle } netHandle - Indicates the network to be set. See {@link NetHandle}.
@param { string } netExtAttribute - Indicates the extended attribute of the network.
@returns { Promise<void> } The promise returned by the function.
@throws { BusinessError } 2100002 - Failed to connect to the service.
节点.return_description: The promise returned by the function.

error_codes.description: Failed to connect to the service.
